positive: A symmetrical, high-contrast geometric arrangement featuring lush tropical flora silhouettes (monstera leaves, palms, ferns) interwoven with abstract golden ratio spiral patterns. The style should be Art Deco meets Neo-Tropicalism, rendered in a limited color palette of deep midnight blue, vibrant teal, and gold leaf accents. Composition must be centered and highly scalable for apparel printing, ensuring clear negative space for strong silhouette definition. Crisp lines, smooth vector quality, strong graphic impact, illuminated by soft studio backlight.
negative: blurry, grainy, low-res, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, busy background, noisy, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, multiple subjects, cartoon, photo realistic, 3d render
